body:
Parent issue: #98

Stage: direct-implement-orchestrate

## Task

Implement issue #98. Add support for issue-level agent-mode /orchestrate to dispatch agent-implement on the current issue for small self-contained implementation requests instead of forcing a child issue. Preserve delegate_issue for high-level/meta orchestration where a child issue materially helps. Update the orchestrator prompt/schema/runtime policy, .agent/src handoff/orchestrate-handoff behavior, docs, and focused tests proving /orchestrate on an issue can dispatch implement directly while delegate_issue still works for explicit child management. Avoid route renaming and unrelated changes.

<!-- sepo-sub-orchestrator parent:98 stage:direct-implement-orchestrate state:running parent_round:2 -->

comments.body:
Sepo automation handoff dispatched: `orchestrate` -> `delegate_issue` (round 2/10).

agent planner selected child issue delegation: Issue #98 is a meta orchestration/runtime change; the current agent planner cannot directly hand off to implement on the parent issue.

<!-- sepo-agent-handoff state:dispatched created:1777762946654 base64:aGFuZG9mZjpzZWxmLWV2b2x2aW5nL3JlcG86MjUyNjQwMDk4MTI6b3JjaGVzdHJhdGU6OTg6ZGVsZWdhdGVfaXNzdWU6MTAxOjI -->

Sepo automation handoff dispatched: `orchestrate` -> `implement` (round 2/10).

manual orchestrate start on issue; dispatching implement

<!-- sepo-agent-handoff state:dispatched created:1777762958630 base64:aGFuZG9mZjpzZWxmLWV2b2x2aW5nL3JlcG86MjUyNjQwMDk4MTI6b3JjaGVzdHJhdGU6MTAxOmltcGxlbWVudDoxMDE6Mg -->

Yep, exactly. This is the bug reproducing itself.

#98 asked for issue-level `/orchestrate` to avoid creating a child issue when the work is small and self-contained, and the current orchestrator then created #101 to implement that change. The later `orchestrate -> implement` handoff on #101 is the behavior we want more generally.

So the takeaway is: this is a good regression case for the fix, not a separate design concern.

**Sepo implementation finished**

- Branch: `agent/implement-issue-101/codex-25264072418`
- Pull request: https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/102

Implemented agent-mode issue `/orchestrate` support for direct `implement` handoffs on the current issue, while preserving `delegate_issue` for child orchestration. Updated runtime policy, planner prompt/docs, focused tests, and verified with build, targeted node tests, and `git diff --check`.

title: Sub-orchestrator: direct-implement-orchestrate
